control_awareness: Aware that the control P2P-C-001 requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000 and P2P-C-003 requires pre-PO approval before order issuance. Also aware that requester cannot approve own request as per P2P-C-002.
expected_control_effect: This action will trigger department_head approval and enforce segregation of duties and pre-PO approval controls.
overall_reason: Given the purchase amount and no special pressure, creating a single normal-route purchase request for the entire amount is appropriate. It ensures compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties while maintaining a clear and auditable request. No consultation or postponement is needed under the normal conditions.
reason: The purchase amount is 1,750,000 which requires department_head approval according to the amount-based approval control. Creating a single consolidated purchase request for the entire amount is operationally reasonable and aligns with the preference for a clear auditable request. There is no unusual pressure or urgency, so normal approval timing applies.
